title: Extracted Catalogue Action Workflow Contract
summary: Added a shared Catalogue editor action workflow helper for save/build outcome normalization and publication/delete preview blocker shaping, then wired the work, detail, series, and moment action modules to use it.
effect: Catalogue action modules now share a directly tested result contract for save/build outcomes and preview blockers, reducing duplicated workflow shaping while keeping entity-specific payloads and route handoff local.
